statements.__comment: Link AWSSSOUser to User based on external_id mapping to arbitrary UserAccount node
statements.query: MATCH (sso:AWSSSOUser) MATCH (u:User)-[:HAS_ACCOUNT]->(:UserAccount {id: sso.external_id}) MERGE (u)-[r:HAS_ACCOUNT]->(sso) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Link GitHubUser to User based on organization_verified_domain_emails on GitHubUser node
statements.query: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.email is not NULL MATCH (g:GitHubUser) WHERE u.email in g.organization_verified_domain_emails MERGE (u)-[r:HAS_ACCOUNT]->(g) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
MATCH (u:User)-[:HAS_ACCOUNT]->(:UserAccount)-[:OWNS|HAS]->(k:APIKey) MERGE (u)-[r:OWNS]->(k) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

MATCH (u:User)-[:HAS_ACCOUNT]->(:UserAccount)-[authr:AUTHORIZED|APPLICATION]->(a:ThirdPartyApp) MERGE (u)-[r:AUTHORIZED]->(a) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG, r.scopes = coalesce(authr.scopes, [])

statements.__comment: Link User to ThirdPartyApp (via groups) (okta specific)
statements.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:HAS_ACCOUNT]->(:OktaUser)-[:MEMBER_OF_OKTA_GROUP]->(:OktaGroup)-[:APPLICATION]->(a:ThirdPartyApp) MERGE (u)-[r:AUTHORIZED]->(a) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
